podcasts.title: How I run my entire Shopify using Claude #shorts
podcasts.transcript: how I run Shopify stores with Claude. Can you tell me what my best selling product on Shopify was? Great, and you can see it's pulling in analytics, it's pulling in all the products here. It says our best selling product is our liquid instant coffee. You know, we've had 2,300 orders. The most viewed product is the premium coffee concentrate. So, it's pulling in all the details over the last 12 months, which is awesome.
